session.task: Build Cursor Agent Kanban board with session tracer integration

events.reason: Reading Cursor global state DB to extract real chat titles from composer.composerHeaders instead of parsing raw transcript text
events.notes: Found composerHeaders with name, subtitle, linesAdded, filesChanged metadata

events.reason: Rewrote agents.ts to query SQLite DB for real Cursor metadata. Added lines added/removed, context usage, mode, archive status to agent cards.
events.notes: 356 total composers, filtered to 137 with meaningful activity

events.reason: Integrating cursor-session-tracer MCP by cloning repo, installing deps, starting uvicorn server on port 8080, and registering in .cursor/mcp.json
events.notes: Tracer provides start_trace, append_trace, end_trace MCP tools

events.reason: Built TraceView component showing reasoning steps as vertical timeline with tool call badges, file touch indicators, and staggered animations
events.notes: Inspired by cursor-session-tracer decision graph visualization
